kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly one of (the members of the Gate Ward, Aldric, and Wulfric) goes with (13 coins or 17 coins).
Between Edmund and Godfrey, one goes with Millpond and the other with 11 coins.
Between Godfrey and Matilda, one goes with 13 coins and the other with 15 coins.
Either Millpond goes with 13 coins, or Southgate goes with 7 coins — but not both.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is lower than both Godfrey and the artisan in Highrow.
Exactly two of Godfrey, the artisan with 7 coins, the artisan with 9 coins, and the artisan with 11 coins belong to the Market Ward.
Southgate goes with exactly one of Beatrix, 9 coins, or 15 coins.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is higher than both Aldric and Matilda.
Exactly two of these are true: Aldric goes with Kingsford; Edmund goes with 11 coins; Matilda goes with Highrow.
Either Kingsford goes with 11 coins or someone in the Hill Ward goes with 11 coins.

So Matilda does not go with 9 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Exactly one of (the members of the East Watershed, Boone, and Wade) goes with (8 lb or 12 lb).
Between Esther and Mabel, one goes with Pinehollow and the other with 6 lb.
Between Mabel and Royce, one goes with 8 lb and the other with 10 lb.

The angler at Stillwater's weight is lower than both Mabel and the angler at Grayreach.
Exactly two of Mabel, the catch with 2 lb, the catch with 4 lb, and the catch with 6 lb belong to the West Watershed.
Willowmere goes with exactly one of Cody, 4 lb, or 10 lb.
The angler at Pinehollow's weight is higher than both Boone and Royce.
Exactly two of these are true: Boone goes with Mossbank; Esther goes with 6 lb; Royce goes with Grayreach.
Either Mossbank goes with 6 lb or someone in the South Watershed goes with 6 lb.
